title: Verify the screen displays 'You have no messages' when no messages are present
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Messages' section. | Verify the screen displays 'You have no messages.'
expected_result: The screen should display 'You have no messages.'

title: Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is present and functional
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Messages' section. | Click on the 'Post an Ad' button. | Verify clicking the 'Post an Ad' button navigates the user to the ad posting page.
expected_result: The 'Post an Ad' button should be clickable and navigate the user to the ad posting page.

title: Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is disabled when no messages are present
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Messages' section. | Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is disabled.
expected_result: The 'Post an Ad' button should be disabled when no messages are present.

title: Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is enabled after posting an ad
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Messages' section. | Click on the 'Post an Ad' button. | Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is enabled after posting an ad.
expected_result: The 'Post an Ad' button should be enabled after posting an ad.

title: Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is disabled after posting an ad
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Messages' section. | Click on the 'Post an Ad' button. | Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is disabled after posting an ad.
expected_result: The 'Post an Ad' button should be disabled after posting an ad.

title: Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is clickable and navigates to the ad posting page
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Messages' section. | Click on the 'Post an Ad' button. | Verify clicking the 'Post an Ad' button navigates the user to the ad posting page.
expected_result: The 'Post an Ad' button should be clickable and navigate the user to the ad posting page.

title: Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is not clickable when no messages are present
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Messages' section. | Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is not clickable when no messages are present.
expected_result: The 'Post an Ad' button should not be clickable when no messages are present.

title: Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is clickable after posting an ad
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'My Messages' section. | Click on the 'Post an Ad' button. | Verify the 'Post an Ad' button is clickable after posting an ad.
expected_result: The 'Post an Ad' button should be clickable after posting an ad.
